prose:
The frontier orbital analysis of oxygen was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation was run on the neutral species with a multiplicity of 3. The calculation converged successfully.

The highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) energy is -8.8740 eV.
The lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) energy is -3.5859 eV.
The HOMO-LUMO gap is 5.2881 eV.
